command:
cd /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cc002 && ls && printf '
---
' && [ -f SOUL.md ] && sed -n '1,200p' SOUL.md && printf '
---
' && [ -f USER.md ] && sed -n '1,200p' USER.md && printf '
---
' && d=$(date -u +%F); y=$(date -u -d 'yesterday' +%F 2>/dev/null || python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
print((datetime.now(timezone.utc)-timedelta(days=1)).strftime('%F'))
PY
); for f in memory/$d.md memory/$y.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && { echo FILE:$f; sed -n '1,200p' "$f"; echo '---'; }; done && [ -f MEMORY.md ] && sed -n '1,200p' MEMORY.md
